metadata.description: Tool-agnostic project-management skill plus the Anchor curriculum — a first-project course that teaches absolute beginners to build, test, and ship their first web app by directing an AI agent through eight milestones.

plugins.name: project-manager
plugins.description: Set up, organize, and run software projects from intent to shipped artifact. Bootstraps .project-manager/ scaffolding, runs the bounded operating loop, writes retrospectives, and supports both greenfield (start from scratch) and brownfield (read existing materials and bootstrap from them) flows.

plugins.name: anchor-coach
plugins.description: The Anchor curriculum — an interactive, agent-collaborative first-project course. Teaches an absolute beginner to brainstorm, describe, scaffold, build, test, ship, and launch a working web app (Anchor — a local task tracker) in about two hours of session time, then transfers the skill to a project of the student's own choosing.
